name: Astral Manga
description: Manga provider for Astral-Manga.fr — bypasses Cloudflare via cf_clearance cookie or SearXNG proxy
author: eren

fields.name: proxyUrl
fields.label: Proxy URL (optional)

fields.name: cfClearance
fields.label: cf_clearance cookie
fields.description: Paste your cf_clearance value from astral-manga.fr browser cookies for full access
